title: Grilled Strawberry Glazed Grilllets
description: Sweet and savory grilled meat with a tangy strawberry glaze.
instructions: Season grilllets with salt and pepper.
Grill grilllets for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix sliced strawberries with minced garlic.
Reduce strawberry-garlic mixture over medium heat to create a glaze.
Brush glaze over grilled grilllets during the last minute of cooking.
Let grilllets rest for 2 minutes before serving.
